codes.notes: Standard hours worked during your scheduled assignment.
Approved overtime hours worked beyond your regular schedule.
For your own medical, dental, vision, therapy, or healthcare appointments.
For your own illness, injury, recovery, or disability-related absence.
For qualifying family care under Alameda County sick leave policies.
For approved jury service while assigned and scheduled to work.
Enter 0.10 hours when a County holiday falls on the first Monday of a pay period, or when you do not work on the first Monday of a pay period.
